chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2089 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For hearing of CMA No.7713/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 05.03.2025 Mr. Sikander Ali Siyal, Advocate along with Petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mrs. Shahbana Naheed, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< SIP Safdar Ali, Investigating Officer Crime No.70/2024 of Police Station, Dad Leghari, District Ghotki is present and files statement, same is taken on record. He submits that the interim challan of the case has already been submitted in the Court of law; however, final challan would be submitted in the light of statement of Mst. Sadia recorded today on the directions of this Court. In her 161 CrPC statement, petitioner No.1, Mst. Sadia, the alleged abductee has denied the allegations made in the FIR. He further submits that he will submit final report for disposal of the case under „C‟ class before the concerned Court of Law. Counsel for the petitioners in view of the statement made by the Investigating Officer seeks disposal of instant petition; however, submits that proper protection may be provided to the petitioners. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of along with listed application with direction to the Investigating Officer to file final report under “C” class as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days. However, the police officials are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners as and when required in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
